allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d = json.load\(open\('assets/seed_data/cartridges.json'\)\); print\(f'OK: {len\(d\)} cartridges'\); pistol_saami = [c for c in d if c.get\('saamiDoc'\) == 'Z299.3']; print\(f'SAAMI pistol cartridges: {len\(pistol_saami\)}'\); [print\(f'  - {c[\\"name\\"]}'\) for c in pistol_saami]")
